# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project overview

Static Jekyll site for Home Buns (homebunscr.com), a Costa Rican artisanal bread bakery. It's a single-page landing site: nearly all content lives in `index.html`, rendered through `_layouts/default.html`. Content is in Spanish (es-CR).

## Commands

```bash
bundle install                 # install gems (first run / after Gemfile changes)
bundle exec jekyll serve       # local dev server with live rebuild, http://localhost:4000
bundle exec jekyll build       # build to _site/
```

There is no test suite, linter, or JS build step in this repo ‚Äî it's plain Jekyll + Liquid + Sass.

## Architecture

- **`index.html`** ‚Äî the entire landing page as Liquid sections (`#inicio`, `#productos`, `#nosotros`, `#por-que`, `#contacto`), each wrapped in `.shell`/`.section-pad` containers. Front matter sets `layout: default`. Inline SVG icons for product measurements are built once via `{% capture %}` at the top of the file and reused across product cards.
- **`_layouts/default.html`** ‚Äî the active layout: header/nav, `{{ content }}`, footer, JSON-LD `Bakery` schema, SEO meta tags (uses `jekyll-seo-tag`). This is what `index.html` and `404.html` use.
- **`_layouts/defaultNew.html`** ‚Äî an older Bootstrap-based layout (pulls in Bootstrap CSS/JS from a CDN, renders nav from `_data/menus.yml`). Not used by `index.html`; kept for reference/history rather than active use. Don't assume changes to `_data/menus.yml` affect the live page ‚Äî only `defaultNew.html` reads it.
- **`_config.yml`** ‚Äî site-wide values referenced throughout templates via `site.*`: `whatsapp` (phone number used to build `wa.me` links), `form_url` (external Microsoft Forms contact form), `social.instagram`/`social.facebook`, `logo`, `favicon`. Update contact/social info here rather than hardcoding it in pages.
- **`assets/css/theme.scss`** ‚Äî the actual stylesheet, compiled by Jekyll's Sass converter (needs the empty `---`/`---` front matter at the top to be processed). CSS custom properties in `:root` (`--bg`, `--orange`, `--cream`, etc.) drive the color scheme ‚Äî a dark/charcoal background with an orange accent. `assets/css/theme copy.scss` is a backup/unused duplicate; edit `theme.scss`, not the copy.
- **`assets/images/products/`** ‚Äî product photos referenced directly by filename (with spaces) in `index.html`'s `<img src>` tags; when adding/renaming product images, update the corresponding `src` paths.
- **`_site/`** ‚Äî Jekyll's build output, checked into the repo. Do not hand-edit files under `_site/`; they're regenerated by `jekyll build`/`serve`.

## Conventions

- Site copy is Spanish; keep new content/microcopy consistent in tone and language with existing sections.
- WhatsApp CTAs use the pattern `https://wa.me/{{ site.whatsapp }}?text=...` with URL-encoded prefilled messages ‚Äî follow this pattern for new CTAs rather than linking bare phone numbers.
- Image `<img>` tags use explicit `width`/`height` attributes matching the source asset dimensions to avoid layout shift; keep this when adding images.
